content: imgui-bundle (Dear ImGui Python binding) provides true immediate-mode GUI, faster/more responsive for complex heavy UIs than pygame_gui but does NOT integrate directly with pygame's SDL renderer -- typically requires GLFW/ModernGL as the GPU backend, meaning a second windowing/rendering context alongside pygame's surface-based drawing. This added integration complexity is not worth it for a flight-strip bay / comms log / frequency box of modest widget count. pygame_gui is SDL-native and drops straight into a pygame surface loop.
